description: Task 3.5 chat-formatted parity probe — Gemma 4 E2B Q4_K_M on emb-001. Raw token IDs come from a live `engine.chatCompletion` browser probe (the exact prompt that WebLLM sends to the model) so the parity is measured against the actual eval input, not a reconstructed best-guess of `apply_chat_template`. Last prompt token is 107 (newline), the position from which the model's first answer token is sampled.

messages_context.content: You are a semantic similarity assistant. Answer with exactly one word from the given choices. Do not add explanation or punctuation.
Which word is most similar in meaning to 'happy': sad, joyful, tired, heavy?

expected_first_token_text: joyful (or '__joyful' = id 86533 — the right answer per the task)
prompts: PLACEHOLDER — see input_token_ids; the chat-formatted text isn't reconstructed because special-token round-tripping isn't lossless across SPM variants.
